001package net.okocraft.box.api.event.stockholder;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.BoxProvider;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.event.stock.StockSaveEvent;
005import net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
007
008/**
009 * A {@link StockHolderEvent} called when the stockholder is saved.
010 */
011public class StockHolderSaveEvent extends StockHolderEvent {
012
013    /**
014     * The constructor of {@link StockHolderSaveEvent}.
015     *
016     * @param stockHolder the saved stockholder
017     */
018    public StockHolderSaveEvent(@NotNull StockHolder stockHolder) {
019        super(stockHolder);
020        BoxProvider.get().getEventBus().callEvent(new StockSaveEvent(stockHolder)); // for compatibility
021    }
022
023    @Override
024    public String toString() {
025        return "StockHolderSaveEvent{" +
026                "stockholder=" + getStockHolder() +
027                "}";
028    }
029}
